required_channel_not_joined: ⚠️ You have not joined the channel yet. Please join, then press “I joined” again.
session_expired: Session expired. Please type /shop to try again.
shop_digital_warning:
🎁 TOP UP WALLET FOR 5-10% BONUS 🔥
👇 CHOOSE A PRODUCT BELOW:
start: 👋 Welcome to the shop! Use the buttons below to explore products.
fbunlock_menu_text: 🔓 UNLOCK FACEBOOK Bot is the middleman between customers and service workers. • Customers create cases for free to receive quotes. • Multiple workers can quote the same case. • Customers choose a quote and pay escrow to the bot. • After payment, the selected worker handles the case.
fbunlock_worker_menu_text: 🧑‍💻 SERVICE WORKER AREA You can view cases waiting for quotes and send your handling price. Platform fee: {fee_percent}% on completed cases. Example quote 300,000đ, fee {fee_percent}%, expected receive {sample_payout}.
fbunlock_prompt_customer_username:
Please enter your Telegram username:
Example: @yourname

Note: it must match the Telegram account currently using the bot.
fbunlock_prompt_issue:
📌 What problem is your Facebook account having?

Example: checkpoint, 956 lock, safe, identity verification, lost 2FA...
fbunlock_prompt_locked_duration: How long has your account been locked?
fbunlock_prompt_case_note:
How would you like to describe your case title to service workers?

Example: my acc is locked 956, but I have full documents, whoever can unlock please take this case!
fbunlock_prompt_worker_username:
Please enter your Telegram username:
Example: @yourname

Note: it must match the Telegram account currently using the bot.
fbunlock_prompt_worker_services:
Services you can handle:
Example: 282, 956, FAQ
fbunlock_prompt_quote_amount: 💬 Enter a quote for case {case_id}. Examples: 300000, 30k = 30000, 1m = 1000000
fbunlock_prompt_quote_note: Do you want to add extra content for the customer? Case: {case_id} Price: {amount} Example: can handle quickly, or accept if documents are available. If not, type: no
fbunlock_prompt_dispute_reason: ⚠️ Please enter the dispute reason for case {case_id}. Example: Worker marked done but the account is still locked.
fbunlock_case_created: ✅ Facebook unlock case created. Case ID: {case_id} Status: waiting for service workers to quote. You have not been charged yet. When there is a quote, the bot will send it for you to choose and pay.
fbunlock_worker_registered_pending: ✅ Registration submitted. Please wait for admin approval.
fbunlock_quote_sent_worker: ✅ Quote sent for case {case_id}. Price: {amount} The bot will send this quote for the customer to choose.
fbunlock_worker_cases_empty: There are no cases waiting for quote right now.
fbunlock_worker_paid_cases_empty: No customer has paid for your cases yet.
fbunlock_worker_my_cases_empty: You have no cases in progress.
fbunlock_customer_my_cases_empty: You have no Facebook unlock cases.
fbunlock_customer_action_delete_empty: No case can be deleted or hidden.
fbunlock_customer_action_message_empty: No case can message service right now.
fbunlock_confirm_delete_case: Are you sure you want to delete case {case_id}? The case will disappear from your list and stop being sent to service workers.
fbunlock_quote_accepted_customer: ✅ You accepted quote {amount} for case {case_id}. Press payment so the bot can hold escrow, then the worker will process the case.
fbunlock_worker_done_customer: ✅ Service worker marked case {case_id} as completed. Please check and confirm.
fbunlock_case_completed_customer: ✅ Case {case_id} completed. Thank you for confirming. Worker payout: {worker_payout} Platform fee: {platform_fee}
fbunlock_cancel_unpaid_customer:
Case cancelled. You were not charged, so no refund is needed.

Do you want to repost this case for other workers to quote?
fbunlock_repost_case_done: ✅ Case reposted. Old case: {old_case_id} New case: {new_case_id} Status: waiting for service workers to quote.
fbunlock_dispute_sent_customer: Dispute with reason sent to admin.
